_comment: Patient-side readiness fields. In the full pipeline these are LLM-extracted from the record with quotes; seeded here so the readiness gate demos deterministically.

medical_clearance.evidence: medically cleared by ED attending, labs unremarkable

risk_assessment.evidence: risk assessed at intake; NOT formally reassessed since

legal_status.evidence: 5150 expired, voluntary documented in day 2 psychiatry note

no_violence_risk.evidence: no behavioral incidents; no seclusion or restraint this admission
